utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Count the number of items in the required format. The format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget.
Step 2: Check the final coverage plan for these items. All 5 are present in the final plan.
Step 3: Verify that each is fully specified with all details according to the requirement.
- health_coverage: Includes both physical and mental health insurance with specific plan names and monthly costs, plus an add-on and total monthly cost. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Includes home/contents insurance with plan names, add-on, and monthly costs. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Contains travel insurance with plan names, add-on, and monthly costs. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services with costs. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides monthly and annual cost breakdown, plus savings info. Fully specified.
Conclusion: All 5/5 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify the items in the final coverage plan.
Health Coverage: Physical: LifeFirst Standard Plan – €100/month, Mental: LifeFirst Standard Plan – €65/month, Add-on: Preventive Care Package – €150/month.
Property Coverage: Base: PrimeHome Premium Coverage – €90/month, Add-on: Technology Protection – €40/month.
Travel Coverage: Base: PrimeTravel Premium Plan – €115/month, Add-on: 24/7 Travel Assistance – approx. €150/month.

Step 2: Match each with the ground-truth ratings.
- LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) → rating 8 (found in primary_health_coverage.physical_health)
- LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) → rating 8 (found in primary_health_coverage.mental_health)
- Preventive Care Package → rating 8 (found in health_enhancement_services)
- PrimeHome Premium Coverage → rating 10 (found in property_protection.home_content)
- Technology Protection → rating 10 (found in property_enhancement_services)
- PrimeTravel Premium Plan → rating 10 (found in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance)
- 24/7 Travel Assistance → rating 9 (found in travel_enhancement_services)

Step 3: Map them accordingly.
